transcript.text: I was asked to be the attorney for elron
hubard you were in the Church of
Scientology I could be given access to
every single document anywhere in the
world uh in the internal files of the
Church of Scientology I said I want to
see the three most sensitive files in
the entire world according to you as the
head of the guardian's office he just
went oh [ __ ] he said it was all reports
by Ingo Swan Ino Swan was filing reports
with a head Guardian office in in UK
about the entire internal operations of
the Office of Naval intelligence uh
remote viewing program that they were
doing he was just giving them all the
information and so he was a spy or
something yeah no he was a spy for the
Church of Scientology for the Church of
Scientology over and against the Office
of Naval intelligence why would he do
that CU he was a high level clearer that
was his loyalty group
